# franchisetech

> Cloud POS and business control for cafes, restaurants, and food businesses in Ireland, Romania, and the EU.

franchisetech is a browser-based workspace: POS register, kitchen display, stock & purchases, recipe costing, till close (Z-report), and owner reports. Not payments-first — operations-first for owners who need sales, cash, stock, and margins in one place.

**Full AI index:** https://franchisetech.ro/llms-full.txt

## Primary markets

- Romania (lei/RON, TVA 19%/9%/5%, FiscalNet when configured): https://franchisetech.ro/industries/romania
- Ireland (EUR, Irish VAT rates): https://franchisetech.ro/industries/ireland

## High-intent pages

- Pricing: https://franchisetech.ro/pricing
- Compare POS (logos + tables): https://franchisetech.ro/compare
- POS feature: https://franchisetech.ro/features/pos
- Stock management: https://franchisetech.ro/features/stock-management
- Recipe costing: https://franchisetech.ro/features/recipe-costing
- Romania FiscalNet guide: https://franchisetech.ro/help/romania-fiscalnet
- Resources / guides: https://franchisetech.ro/resources

## Romanian comparisons (images + OG cards)

- SmartBill: https://franchisetech.ro/compare/smartbill
- Saga: https://franchisetech.ro/compare/saga
- RezoSoft: https://franchisetech.ro/compare/rezosoft
- Expressoft: https://franchisetech.ro/compare/expressoft
- hePOS: https://franchisetech.ro/compare/hepos
- VilicoRest: https://franchisetech.ro/compare/vilicorest

15-day assisted trial. Signup: https://franchisetech.ro/signup
